zh.lifeSummary: 當John Hitchcock於1586年6月1日出生在英國維爾爾哥吉拉 卡寧斯時，他的父親Richard Hitchcock30歲，母親Maud Webb26歲。他於1613年2月7日與Mary Franklin在英國維爾爾馬爾波洛結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1629年6月12日在他的家鄉享年43歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭維爾爾哥吉拉 卡寧斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Hitchcock于1586年6月1日出生在英国維爾爾哥吉拉 卡寧斯时，他的父亲Richard Hitchcock30岁，母亲Maud Webb26岁。他于1613年2月7日与Mary Franklin在英国維爾爾馬爾波洛结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1629年6月12日在他的家乡享年43岁，埋葬在英国英格兰維爾爾哥吉拉 卡寧斯。

nameMeanings.name: Hitchcock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from a pet form of the Middle English personal name Hitch , a pet form of Richard , with the Middle English diminutive suffix -cok. Compare Heacock .

variants.name: Hitch
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Hich, a rhyming pet form of Richard. Compare Hick .

variants.name: Hedgecoth
meanings: English: variant of   Hitchcock  . Compare   Hedgecock  .

variants.name: Hedgecock
meanings: English (southeastern): variant of   Hitchcock  , altered by folk etymology.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When John Hitchcock was born on 1 June 1586, in All Cannings, Wiltshire, England, his father, Richard Hitchcock, was 30 and his mother, Maud Webb, was 26. He married Mary Franklin on 7 February 1613, in Marlborough, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 12 June 1629, in his hometown, at the age of 43, and was buried in All Cannings, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Hitchcock est né le 1 juin 1586, à All Cannings, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Hitchcock, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Maud Webb, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Mary Franklin le 7 février 1613, à Marlborough, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 12 juin 1629, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterré à All Cannings, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Hitchcock am 1. Juni 1586 in All Cannings, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Hitchcock 30 und seine Mutter Maud Webb 26. Er hat am 7. Februar 1613 in Marlborough, Wiltshire, England Mary Franklin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 12. Juni 1629 im Alter von 43 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in All Cannings, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Hitchcock è nato il il 1 giugno 1586 nel All Cannings, Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, Richard Hitchcock, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Maud Webb, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Mary Franklin il 7 febbraio 1613, nel Marlborough, Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 12 giugno 1629, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolto a All Cannings, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Hitchcockが1586年6月1日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアアル カニングズで生まれた時，父Richard Hitchcockは30歳，母Maud Webbは26歳であった。1613年2月7日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアマルルボロウでMary Franklinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1629年6月12日に故郷で43歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアアル カニングズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Hitchcock(이)가 1586년 6월 1일 영국 윌츠히르 앨 캔잉스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Hitchcock(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Webb(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1613년 2월 7일 영국 윌츠히르 말를버루그h에서 Mary Franklin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1629년 6월 12일 그의 고향에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 앨 캔잉스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Hitchcock nasceu em 1 de junho de 1586, em All Cannings, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Hitchcock, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Maud Webb, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Franklin em 7 de fevereiro de 1613, em Marlborough, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 12 de junho de 1629, em sua cidade natal, com 43 anos, e foi sepultado em All Cannings, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Hitchcock родился 1 июня 1586 г. в местности алл каннингс, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Hitchcock было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Webb, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Franklin 7 февраля 1613 г. в местности марлбороую, уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 12 июня 1629 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности алл каннингс, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания.
